nodes.label: ProcessMaker 4 Iframe Integration
nodes.rationale: React forms are built as standalone components and embedded in ProcessMaker 4 via iframes, replicating native forms while running outside the ProcessMaker environment.

nodes.label: Shared Style Libraries Deduplication
nodes.rationale: Deduplicating screens by UUID during migration prevents multiple duplicate copies of global CSS/JS library screens from being created in the destination instance.

nodes.label: Proxy Token Resolution and Upload Flow
nodes.rationale: Bearer tokens are passed from iframe URLs or environment, decrypted via AES-256-CBC, and injected into headers. Files are uploaded prior to task completion via a multipart proxy.
nodes.norm_label: proxy token resolution and upload flow

nodes.label: ZrTable
nodes.rationale: Purely presentational table component. Sorting, pagination, and selection are not built-in and must be managed externally. Uses a caption prop for better accessibility (a11y) over simple headers.

nodes.label: ZrTabs
nodes.rationale: 1-based indexing for active tab selection (model, tab-<index>, and tab-<index>-label) to align with design specs rather than 0-based indexing. Managed internally but controlled externally via model + onChange.

nodes.label: ZrTile
nodes.rationale: ZrTile is a structured promo molecule with predefined zones (header, content, image, actions) as opposed to ZrCard, which is a generic container surface/layout primitive.

nodes.label: Zurich Branding Assets
nodes.rationale: A collection of visual identity assets (logos, typography, colors) to theme the ProcessMaker 4 interface custom forms for Zurich Regional (Colombia).
